---
title: "EUt+ EXTRAS - Experimentation to Transform Research Activities and Steering - European University of Technology"
date: "2021"
year: "2021-2024"
funder: "H2020-EU.5. - Science With and for Society"
categories: [Media & Social Media Monitoring]
---

EUt+ EXTRAS - Experimentation to Transform Research Activities and Steering - European University of Technology
